reasoning: Dekhi, I'm voting for Shantanu Thakur and BJP again. In 2019 I made my choice because I saw how TMC's local leaders like Shahjahan were doing whatever they wanted without anyone checking them, and my husband and I felt a strong government at the center was needed. Since then—Sandeshkhali, the SSC scam, all of it—it's just confirmed I was right. And five days ago, Modi brought the CAA certificates, 14 people got them already. That's BJP keeping their promise, na? Biswajit Das, he's been back and forth so many times—first TMC, then BJP, now TMC again. What kind of choice is that? At least with Shantanu Thakur and BJP, I know what I'm getting. They do what they say they will do.
primary_drivers: Accountability and checking local corruption (Shahjahan as proof)
BJP following through on promises (CAA certificates just before election)
Distrust of TMC's local arrogance and flip-flopping politics
